case_title: ACOSTA, MIGUEL ALFREDO VS ARDOIN, DAVID

docket_entries.description: CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,100.00 FILED BY ARDOIN, DAVID AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT ACOSTA, MIGUEL ALFREDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-07-2005 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,900.00 FILED BY ACOSTA, MIGUEL ALFREDO AS TO DEFENDANT ARDOIN, DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-07-2005 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF ACOSTA, MIGUEL ALFREDO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT ARDOIN, DAVID RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT ACOSTA, MIGUEL ALFREDO $2,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $131.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,231.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ACOSTA, MIGUEL ALFREDO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ARDOIN, DAVID STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
